channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Suspect arrested after series of sexual assaults in San Fernando Valley over six-hour period
item.description: Los Angeles police have arrested a 29-year-old man accused of carrying out a series of sexual assaults against multiple women during a six-hour period in the San Fernando Valley. Damian Denzell Robins...

item.title: UNESCO report warns climate change threatens global heritage sites, urges urgent action and investment
item.description: UNESCO ki aik nayi global assessment report ke mutabiq agar duniya global warming ko har 1 degree Celsius tak kam karne mein kamyab ho jaye, to un World Heritage sites ki tadaad aadhi ho sakti hai jo ...

item.title: Police release age-progressed image of Sandy Davidson on 50th anniversary of his disappearance
item.description: On 23 April 1976, three-year-old Sandy Davidson vanished from his grandmother's garden in the Bourtreehill area of Irvine, North Ayrshire, Scotland. Sandy was playing with his younger sister Donna, th...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Orders Inquiry into Non-Functional Early Warning Systems in GB
item.description: On April 23, 2026, Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif expressed his frustration over the non-functional early warning systems in Gilgit-Baltistan (GB) that are meant to protect the region from climate-rela...

item.title: Northern Sea Route emerges as strategic Arctic trade corridor reshaping Asia-Pacific energy flows
item.description: The article examines how the Northern Sea Route (NSR), running along Russia’s Arctic coastline, is rapidly becoming a key maritime corridor linking Europe and Asia. Once considered a largely inaccessi...

item.title: Economic implications of Tanzania lacking a domestic oil refinery
item.description: This opinion piece explains how Tanzania continues to lose significant economic value by not having its own oil refinery. The author highlights that although global tensions, such as potential disrupt...

item.title: Ibom Air names Banjana Bailor as new Director of Flight Operations
item.description: Ibom Air don announce say dem don appoint Banjana Bailor as di new Director of Flight Operations as part of dem plan to expand go international routes. Bailor get over 40 years experience for aviation...

item.title: Court Orders Return of Former Zambian President’s Body Amid Family Dispute
item.description: The body of former Zambian president Edgar Chagwu Lungu remains in South Africa due to a dispute between his family and the Zambian government regarding his burial. Lungu’s wife, Esther Lungu, filed a...

item.title: Analysts highlight opportunities in infrastructure software stocks amid sector downturn
item.description: A recent market roundup highlights renewed analyst interest in infrastructure software companies despite a sharp sector decline in 2026. According to BofA Securities analyst Koji Ikeda, the sector has...

item.title: Software stocks decline as earnings highlight ongoing uncertainty around AI impact
item.description: U.S. software stocks declined in premarket trading following quarterly earnings from IBM and ServiceNow that, despite beating expectations, failed to reassure investors about the long-term impact of a...

item.title: DP Kindiki Urges Calm Over Fuel Price Protests and Highlights Government Interventions
item.description: Deputy President Kithure Kindiki has appealed to political leaders to refrain from inciting young people into violent protests over the rising fuel prices, stressing that such actions do not solve the...

item.title: Man Group Shares Fall After $6 Billion Client Withdrawal in Q1
item.description: Man Group, recognized as the world's largest publicly listed hedge fund firm, experienced a significant share price decline following the disclosure of a massive $6 billion withdrawal by a single clie...

item.title: Interior design advice for modernising a Collingwood chalet into a warm, dog-friendly retreat
item.description: Interior decorator Virginie Martocq offers practical design guidance for homeowners renovating a newly purchased chalet in Collingwood, Ontario, aiming to create a space that feels warm, inviting, and...

item.title: Authorities and political leaders seek ban on 'Lawrence of Punjab' web series over concerns related to glorification of gangster Lawrence Bishnoi
item.description: The news report highlights a controversy surrounding a web series titled 'Lawrence of Punjab', which is believed to be based on or inspired by the life of gangster Lawrence Bishnoi and its alleged con...

item.title: Court Adjourns El-Rufai Case on Alleged Phone Interception, Sets May Dates for Hearing
item.description: A Federal High Court in Abuja has shifted the trial of former Kaduna State governor, Nasir El-Rufai, over allegations say him unlawfully intercept communication belonging to the National Security Advi...

item.title: Rise in rectal cancer deaths among younger adults prompts concern over delayed diagnosis and screening gaps
item.description: Recent research indicates a concerning rise in rectal cancer deaths among younger adults, particularly those under 45. While overall bowel cancer rates in older populations have declined due to improv...

item.title: NSC to Honour Tanzania’s Best Athletes and Teams at May Awards Event
item.description: The National Sports Council (NSC) of Tanzania is preparing to host its annual Sports Awards in May 2026 in Dar es Salaam, aiming to recognise outstanding athletes and teams for their performance in 20...

item.title: WH Smith Faces Potential Profit Decline Amid Rising Jet Fuel Costs
item.description: WH Smith, the British retail chain, has issued a profit warning due to the anticipated impact of rising jet fuel prices. The company, which operates travel-focused stores at airports and train station...

item.title: PDP Chieftain Ulasi Says Wike's Leadership Won't Help Party Challenge Tinubu in 2027
item.description: Dan Ulasi, a prominent figure within the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP), has expressed concerns about the party's future under the leadership of Nyesom Wike. Speaking on Arise News, Ulasi emphasized t...

item.title: Father with prior firearms conviction suspected of killing eight children in Shreveport
item.description: A tragic and chilling incident has unfolded in Shreveport, Louisiana, where a father is suspected of killing eight of his children. Authorities have revealed that the suspect, whose identity has been ...
